name: direct_play_extends_loose_card
description: Hand 6H right-extends a loose 1-card [5H] stack, producing a 2-card Incomplete stack. Regression guard: maybeMerge must NOT reject Incomplete results (mid-turn 2-card stacks are legitimate; Semantics checks only at turn boundaries). Authored 2026-04-14 after the live-game integration surfaced the bug — all prior fixtures exercised ≥3-card merges.
